name: ss-keel-gorm
description: SQL via GORM — Postgres, MySQL, SQLite (requires CGO_ENABLED=1), SQL Server

steps.description: Database connection string. Engine examples: Postgres → postgres://user:pass@host:5432/db?sslmode=disable | MySQL → user:pass@tcp(host:3306)/db?parseTime=true | SQLite → ./app.db (requires CGO_ENABLED=1)
